scope: High-signal article pages fetched from P0-1 CNKI Overseas rerun; still discovery leads only until two-model source reading.

leads.title: Effects of Ganoderma lucidum Aqueous Extract on Uric Acid Level and Renal Function of Rats with Hyperuricemia
leads.authors: 刘朋;刘利平;熊心怡;冯杰;张劲松;汪雯翰;刘艳芳
leads.abstract_snippet: Aqueous extract of Ganoderma lucidum was measured for contents of total sugar, reducing sugar,polysaccharide, protein, and nucleoside, and determined for its scavenging ability on DPPH and ABTS free radicals. Using the adenosine induced hyperuricemic L-O2 cell model, the effect of the G. lucidum aqueous extract on uric acid level in the culture medium was studied at low(0.25 mg·mL -1 ), medium(0.50 mg·mL -1 )and high(1.00 mg·mL -1 ) doses, respectively. The G. lucidum aqueous extract was also studied for its in vivo effects on a rat model of hyperuricemia induced by potassium oxazinate combined with yeast extract at low(0.5 g·kg -1 ), medium(1.0 g·kg -1 ) and high(2.0 g·kg -1 ) doses by gavage, respectively. Mice in different groups were measured for xanthine oxidase activity in serum and hepatic tissues, uric acid level in serum and kidney tissues, serum creatinine level and serum urea nitrogen level. Hematoxylin eosin staining was used to observe renal and hepatic tissues and determine cell nuclear to cytoplasmic ratio. The results showed that clearance rate of the G. lucidum aqueous extract on DPPH was significantly higher than that against ABTS at 0.25, 0.50,and 1.00 mg·mL -1 .
leads.keywords_snippet: Ganoderma lucidum; hyperuricemia; xanthine oxidase; uric acid; DOI： 10.16488/j.cnki.1005-9873.2024.05.011 Series： (D) Agriculture;(E) Medicine & Public Health Subject： Traditional Chinese Medicinal Herbs Classification Code： R285.5 Online Release Time: 2024-09-24 09:15（The online publication date of CNKI does not represent the print publication date of the article.） Watch video: --> Mobile Rea

leads.title: 灵芝 多糖肽通过调节腺苷脱氨酶和 尿酸 转运蛋白减轻 高尿酸血症
leads.source: 第十二届药用真菌学术研讨会论文集
leads.abstract_snippet: 背景:高尿酸血症在中国发病率高达13.3%,仅次于高血压、高血脂和糖尿病。尿酸产生过多和/或排泄不足是高尿酸血症发生的根本原因。目前常用于治疗高尿酸血症的药物如别嘌呤醇、非布司他和苯溴马隆伴有诸多副作用,影响其临床应用。因此,有必要研发药效明确副作用少的新药用于预防和治疗高尿酸血症。灵芝多糖肽(GLPP)作为灵芝的主要活性成分,具有多种药理作用。 More Reset AbstractFilter('ChDivSummary', 'ChDivSummaryMore', 'ChDivSummaryReset'); Keywords： 高尿酸血症; 尿酸转运蛋白; 灵芝多糖肽; Conference Name: 第十二届药用真菌学术研讨会 Conference Time: 2023-10-21 Conference Place: 中国福建福州 Series： (E) Medicine & Public Health Subject： Traditional Chinese Medicinal Herbs DOI： 10.26914/c.cnkihy.2023.043351 Classification Code： R285.5 Watch video: --> Mobile Reading Read on your phone instantly Step 1 Scan QR Codes "Mobile CNKI-CNKI Express" App Step 2 Open"CNKI Express" and click the scan icon in the upper left corner of the homepage. leads.title: Study on the Mechanism of Anti-inflammatory and Lowering Uric Acid Effect by Total Flavonoids of Phellinus Igniarius in Vitro Based on Network Pharmacology
leads.authors: 刘舟琴;吕梦泠;厉莹玮;蒋晨磊;陆红
leads.source: Chinese Journal of Modern Applied Pharmacy
leads.abstract_snippet: OBJECTIVE To investigate the mechanism of anti-inflammatory and lowering uric acid effect by total flavonoids of Phellinus igniarius(TFPI) based on network pharmacology and experimental validation. METHODS The active ingredients and effective targets of Phellinus igniarius were obtained through TCMSP and TCMID. DisGeNET was used to screen disease targets of hyperuricemia(HUA). Using STRING database to construct protein interaction network by taking intersection targets.Gene Ontology(GO) and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes(KEGG) pathway enrichment were analyzed using Metascape.The visualization analysis was carried out using the bioinformatics platform. Construct a monosodium urate(MSU) crystal-induced HK-2 cell injury model and administer TFPI intervention. The partial predictions from network pharmacology were experimentally validated by detecting cellular reactive oxygen species(ROS) levels using the oxidation-sensitive probe(DCFH-DA), measuring inflammatory factors via enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay(ELISA), and assessing gene and protein expression levels through real-time quantitative PCR(qRT-PCR) and Western blotting. RESULTS Network pharmacology results showed that

leads.title: Rapid identification by UPLC-Q-TOF-MS of the chemical composition of Sanghuangporus vaninii alcohol extract from poplar and its urate-lowering activity and nephroprotective effect
leads.abstract_snippet: The chemical composition of the Sanghuangporus vaninii alcohol extract from poplar was identified by UPLC-Q-TOF-MS， and the compound mass spectrometry data were collected in positive and negative ion modes. In vitro experiments were used to detect the inhibitory effect of Sanghuangporus vaninii alcohol extract on xanthine oxidase (XOD). Animal experiments were used to establish an in vivo model of hyperuricemia (HUA) mice by intragastric administration of potassium oxyzinate， and biochemical indexes such as uric acid (UA)， creatinine (CRE)， urea nitrogen (BUN)， xanthine oxidase activity and other biochemical indexes were measured， and tissues of kidney， liver and spleen were collected， and renal hematoxylin-eosin (HE) staining was used for histopathological examination. Combined with the retention time and related literature， a total of 42 compounds were identified from the Sanghuangporus vaninii flavonol extracts of poplar， including 11 pyrones， 9 organic acids， 8 fatty acids， 7 flavonoids， 3 phenols， 2 amino acids and 2 terpenoids. In vitro experiments showed that the Sanghuangporus vaninii alcohol extract of poplar had a certain inhibitory effect on XOD. The results of animal ex

leads.title: Screening,separation and mass spectrometry analysis of xanthine oxidase inhibitors in Phellinus igniarius
leads.authors: 刘震;侯万超;牛华周;云浩程;刘春明;李赛男;张语迟
leads.abstract_snippet: A new method for the rapid screening and separation of xanthine oxidase inhibitors from Phellinus igniarius was developed using a combination of mathematical modeling,chromatography and mass spectrometry. The extraction process of flavonoid active ingredients in Phellinus igniarius was optimized by using mathematical modeling combined with response surface method,the ultrafiltration-mass spectrometry technique was applied to rapidly screen the inhibitors of xanthine oxidase in Phellinus igniarius;Under the guidance of activity,the active ingredients in Phellinus igniarius were separated and purified by high speed countercurrent chromatography(HSCCC),high performance liquid chromatography-high resolution mass spectrometry coupled with nuclear magnetic resonance spectroscopy was used for the structural identification of the active ingredients in Phellinus igniarius. The results showed that the extraction rate of Phellinus igniarius flavonoids was 24.95 mg/g,which was better than the response surface test;three xanthine oxidase inhibitors with the purity of above 90% were screened and isolated from Phellinus igniarius,and their inhibition effect was in the order of phelligridin D>p

leads.query: 蛹虫草 高尿酸血症
leads.title: Effect and Mechanism of Cordyceps militaris Extract on Lowering Uric Acid in Hyperuricemia Rats
leads.authors: 熊心怡;刘利平;冯杰;张劲松;李德顺;刘朋;刘艳芳
leads.abstract_snippet: 【Objective】 To investigate the effect and the corresponding mechanism of Cordyceps militaris(C.militaris)extract on lowering uric acid by hyperuricemia model rats.【Method】 The contents of total sugars,reducing sugars,polysaccharides,proteins and polyphenols in C.militaris extract were determined.The rat model of hyperuricemia was established based on feeding of potassium oxonate combined with yeast paste.The serum uric acid level,renal function,oxidative stress and inflammation of rats and the changes of intestinal microbial composition were measured to evaluate the effect of C.militaris extract on hyperuricemia rats and its mechanism.【Result】The C.militaris extract contained 35.86% polysaccharides,27.05% proteins,and 0.21% polyphenols.Animal experiments demonstrated that C.militaris extract significantly reduced the serum uric acid levels in hyperuricemia rats.The most effective dose was found to be 0.5 g/(kg·d),leading to a reduction in uric acid levels from 281.62 μmol/L to 93.27 μmol/L,with an inhibition rate of 66.88%.It also inhibited the oxidative stress and inflammation in renal tissue of hyperuricemia rats.Molecular mechanism studies showed that C.militaris extract down-re

leads.query: 蛹虫草 高尿酸血症
leads.title: Analysis of metabolite components of Cordyceps militaris and their effects on hyperuricemia
leads.authors: 都兴范;孟楠;李亚洁;温志新;米锐;孙永欣
leads.abstract_snippet: The components and involved metabolic pathways of Cordyceps militaris were analyzed by quantitative and metabonomics methods and their effects on hyperuricemia caused by purine metabolic disorders were studied. The results show that C. militaris contains 233 metabolites, including cordycepin and cordyceps acid already reported and corticosteroids, epinephrine and glutathione, etc. belonging to ten different categories such as carboxylic acids and their derivatives, organic oxides and fatty acyl groups. KEGG analysis showed their significant enrichment in 19 metabolic pathways including ABC transport protein, amino acid biosynthesis and purine metabolism. Compared with the experimental model group, the serum uric acid level and xanthine oxidase activities were significantly decreased in the middle and high dose treatment groups of mice administrated with C. militaris(P<0.05), showing obvious effects on the prevention and treatment of hyperuricemia. The functional mechanism of C. militaris metabolites was analyzed and discussed. leads.title: Study on the Cordyceps militaris for lowering uric acid of patients with hyperuricemia
leads.authors: 尹艳艳;吴萍萍;朱宝君;龚成;黄儒强
leads.source: Lishizhen Medicine and Materia Medica Research
leads.abstract_snippet: Objective This is a study of Cordyceps militaris powder on reducing effect of uric acid in patients with hyperuricemia. Methods 22 case of patients with hyperuricemia which have no serious cardiovascular,liver,kidney,lung and other vital organs disease were selected to take the cordyceps militaris powder. After taking a period of time,the levels of serum uric acid( UA),blood urea nitrogen( BUN),creatinine( CREA) were measured. Results One month later,there were significant differences in all indicators( P < 0. 05) : efficiency rate decreasing UA reached to 77. 3%; BUN reached to 61. 9%; CREA reached to85. 7%. Conclusion The results showed that Cordyceps militaris powder can significantly reduce the levels of UA,BUN,CREA and has a good effect on reducing uric acid in patients with hyperuricemia. leads.title: 蛹虫草 防治高尿酸血症的实验研究
leads.authors: 胡芳;汪鋆植;於洪建;刘丹;刘莹;张泽生
leads.abstract_snippet: 目的研究蛹虫草提取物对高尿酸血症小鼠的影响,筛选有效部位。方法建立小鼠高尿酸血症模型,观察蛹虫草醇提取物对高尿酸血症小鼠血清中肌酐、尿酸水平及黄嘌呤氧化酶活性的影响;并观察蛹虫草醇提取物石油醚、乙酸乙酯、正丁醇萃取部位及水溶物对高尿酸血症小鼠血清中尿酸水平的影响。结果蛹虫草醇提取物能降低高尿酸血症小鼠血清中肌酐、尿酸水平及黄嘌呤氧化酶活性,有一定剂量依赖性;其中石油醚、正丁醇萃取部位为有效部位。结论蛹虫草有明显的抗高尿酸血症作用,其作用机制与其抑制黄嘌呤氧化酶活性,抑制尿酸合成有关。有效成分有待进一步分析。 More Reset AbstractFilter('ChDivSummary', 'ChDivSummaryMore', 'ChDivSummaryReset'); Video abstract: Please log in and watch log on Keywords： 蛹虫草; 高尿酸血症; 有效部位; 痛风; Series： (E) Medicine & Public Health Subject： Traditional Chinese Medicinal Herbs Classification Code： R285.5 Online Release Time: 2013-08-21（The online publication date of CNKI does not represent the print publication date of the article.） Watch video: --> Mobile Reading Read on your phone instantly Step 1 Scan QR Codes "Mobile CNKI-CNKI Express" App Step 2 Open"CNKI Express" and click the scan icon in the upper left corner of the homepage. leads.authors: 都兴范;孟楠;李亚洁;温志新;米锐;孙永欣
leads.abstract_snippet: The components and involved metabolic pathways of Cordyceps militaris were analyzed by quantitative and metabonomics methods and their effects on hyperuricemia caused by purine metabolic disorders were studied. The results show that C. militaris contains 233 metabolites, including cordycepin and cordyceps acid already reported and corticosteroids, epinephrine and glutathione, etc. belonging to ten different categories such as carboxylic acids and their derivatives, organic oxides and fatty acyl groups. KEGG analysis showed their significant enrichment in 19 metabolic pathways including ABC transport protein, amino acid biosynthesis and purine metabolism. Compared with the experimental model group, the serum uric acid level and xanthine oxidase activities were significantly decreased in the middle and high dose treatment groups of mice administrated with C. militaris(P<0.05), showing obvious effects on the prevention and treatment of hyperuricemia. The functional mechanism of C. militaris metabolites was analyzed and discussed.
